query: Scatter plot the xView1 images in Kaohsiung, Taiwan from June 2017. I want to make sure that you consider a wide area

task0.objective: Fetch images from the xView1 dataset and filter the images specifically from Kaohsiung, Taiwan, dated June 2017.

task1.objective: Generate a scatter plot visualizing the xView1 images for Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
